title: Metaortheme type μ with paired meta-policy

version.description: ver(μ) — recorded per episode so audits can scope editions

partition.description: states are exclusive+exhaustive ONLY if declared true; never assumed

selector.description: select_μ — the state-selecting evidence procedure; partial (may return several states or undetermined)

meta_policy.description: π_μ — conduct conditional on the obtaining state, incl. conduct on undetermined selection
